statement: GPU-based systems still account for roughly 60% of AWS's AI server build-out in 2026, even as custom ASICs grow.
why: Merchant GPUs remain the majority of hyperscaler AI build-out, sustaining strong baseline demand.

impact.mechanism: A ~60% GPU share of AWS AI build-out shows merchant GPUs still carry the majority of new AI capacity.

evidence.source: Spheron Blog - Hyperscaler Custom AI Chips 2026 (competitive structure / S9)
evidence.excerpt: GPU-based systems still account for ~60% of AWS's AI server build-out in 2026.
